Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol KWP2000
Baudrate N/A
Send ID N/A
Receive ID N/A
Functional Addr 32
Functional Name Superviseur
